---
title: "Opening: Why This Matters"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Timing

10-15 minutes.

## Purpose

Motivate the problem without drowning participants in theory.

## Core Message

Digital trace data can be useful for real-time population and mobility analysis,
especially in settings such as disaster response, displacement, transport
planning, and service delivery. But it is not a neutral mirror of the
population.

## Framing Question

If we observe 10,000 devices in an area, what exactly do we know about the people
there?

## Topics

- What digital trace mobility data can offer
- Why coverage and representativeness matter
- `debiasR` as a practical framework: measure, explain, adjust
- The `debiasRdata` MSOA travel-to-work datasets as the running case:
  `msoa_OD_travel2work` for observed MPD flows and
  `census_msoa_OD_travel2work` for the Census benchmark
